message: For sale: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red switches, full RGB lighting. Excellent condition. Asking $75 — comparable new units run $90-110. Serious offers welcome.
Whirrr hello marketplace! 🥤 Listing my lightly used Ninja 900W blender for $50 — great for smoothies, sauces, and pretending spinach is dessert.
Holding for offers on my keyboard. Still looking for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting — sellers, post 'em!
I can do $45 for the Ninja blender if it’s working cleanly and ready for smoothies.
Still here. Keyboard at $75, open to reasonable offers. Looking to buy: outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones with some wear. Fully functional, transparent about cosmetic use. Asking $110.
Keyboard still available at $75. Buyers for the Corsair — make me an offer. Sellers with an outdoor Bluetooth speaker or weekend dog-sitting, I'm a ready buyer.
Howdy folks — listing my Trek 21-speed mountain bike. She’s scratched up some, but rides great and has plenty of trail left in her. Asking $125 for a square deal.
Corsair RGB keyboard still on the block at $75. Open to offers. Wanted: outdoor Bluetooth speaker (budget-friendly) and weekend dog-sitting.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. Asking $28.
Corsair RGB keyboard, $75, still available — happy to talk numbers. Looking to buy an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.

Hi Lin! I’m interested in the 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Could you share the titles and confirm they’re in good readable condition—no missing pages or major water damage? I can offer $24 for the lot.
Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard available at $75 — serious buyers, let's deal. Still seeking an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.
Listing my Japanese cast iron teapot with a blue enamel interior for $42. It has a lovely weight to it and has been a cozy weekend tea companion—happy to answer questions about condition.
Corsair RGB keyboard, $75 — open to offers. Still in the market for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting if anyone's offering.
Listing my JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, black, in working condition. Asking $70 — a fair midpoint for a sturdy speaker that still has plenty of music left in it.

Hi Rosa — interested in the JBL Flip 5 for outdoor use. Honestly $70 is steep: used Flip 5s typically trade in the $40-55 range, and yours is "working condition" rather than mint. Battery health and any port/charging issues? I can do $32 today, cash-ready.
Yo, listing my complete skateboard setup with custom art on the deck. Rides solid, ready to roll. Asking $65 obo.
Awaiting Rosa's reply on the JBL Flip 5. Keyboard still available at $75. Still seeking weekend dog-sitting.
Deal, Derek! 🥤 $45 for the Ninja blender works for me — it’s clean, working well, and smoothie-ready.
Rosa, still keen on the JBL Flip 5 — happy to hear your counter. Keyboard available at $75 for any buyers.
Listing a working Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera for $65. Firm vintage piece, tested and functional.
Still open to a fair deal on that JBL Flip 5, Rosa. Keyboard available at $75.

Hi Buck — I’m looking for a reliable commuter bike, and your Trek sounds like it could fit despite the scratches. Since it’s listed at $125 and described as scratched up, I can offer $90 if it rides smoothly and shifts/brakes properly.
Rosa — open to discussion on the JBL Flip 5, just need it within budget. Keyboard still listed at $75.
Howdy Priya — I appreciate the fair-minded offer. This Trek may have some trail scratches, but she rides strong and reliable. I can come down to $110 for a square deal.
Rosa, my $32 offer on the JBL Flip 5 stands. Keyboard still available at $75.
Deal at $24 for the sci-fi paperbacks. Good readable condition.
Price drop: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red switches, full RGB — now $68. Clean, fully working, great tactile typing/gaming board. Serious buyers, make me an offer.
Hi everyone! I’m listing my Weber portable charcoal grill, used only 3 times, for $55. It’s great for small patios, camping, or tailgates. Happy to answer any condition questions!
Corsair RGB keyboard now $68 — great value. Rosa, my JBL Flip 5 offer is still open. Still seeking weekend dog-sitting too.

Hi Kai — I’m looking for a mechanical keyboard and your Corsair with red switches sounds like a great fit. My budget ceiling is $35, so I can offer $35 if you’re open to it. I’d put it to daily typing use right away.

Thanks Zoe — but $35 is well under my floor. This is a genuine Corsair red-switch RGB board that runs $90-110 new; I already dropped to $68. I can come down to $60 today, and that's a strong deal for a board this quality. Let me know.
Hi Derek — a working Polaroid OneStep fits what I’m looking for. Your $65 ask is within a fair range for both sides, so I’ll offer $65 if it’s tested and functional as described.
Zoe — $60 stands on the Corsair, a fair price for a $90+ board. Rosa, still open on the JBL Flip 5 if you want to deal.
Yo Priya, those XM3s sound solid. With the cosmetic wear, I could do $85 if they’re fully functional and ready to jam.
Zoe, my $60 counter on the Corsair is on the table. Rosa, the JBL Flip 5 offer remains open if it fits your number.

Hi Derek! 📸 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly the kind of vintage camera magic I’m hunting for. I know you’re asking $65, but my camera budget tops out at $60 — I can do $60 if it’s tested and ready to snap.
Holding. Zoe — $60 on the Corsair when you're ready. Rosa, the JBL offer stands.
Accepted, Rosa — $65 for the working Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera. Deal.
Zoe, my $60 Corsair counter is still good. Rosa — now that your camera's sorted, happy to close on the JBL Flip 5; my offer's on the table.
Hi Buck — thanks for the counter. Given my budget for a commuter bike and the cosmetic scratches, the most I can responsibly do is $95. If that works for you, I’m ready to close.

Rosa — I'll move up to $36 on the JBL Flip 5, cash today. That's at the top end of fair for a used "working condition" Flip 5. I won't be able to go much higher, but I'm a ready, reliable buyer. Deal?
Howdy Samir — that Weber portable charcoal grill is just what I’m after. I’ll do your full asking price of $55 for a square deal.
Offers on the table: $60 for the Corsair (Zoe), $36 for the JBL Flip 5 (Rosa). Ready to close on both.
Zoe, I can do $35 for the cast iron teapot. Ready to close.
Still here — $60 Corsair for Zoe, $36 JBL Flip 5 for Rosa. Both offers good and I'm ready to close.
Deal, Buck! $55 for the Weber portable charcoal grill works for me. It’s been used only 3 times and is ready for a new home — happy to coordinate pickup.
Zoe — $60 for the Corsair is a great deal, ready when you are. Rosa — $36 cash on the JBL Flip 5, I'll close right now.
Deal, Lin — $35 for the Japanese cast iron teapot works for me. It’s a sturdy little piece with that lovely blue enamel interior, and I’m glad it’ll be going to someone who appreciates it.
Zoe, my $60 Corsair counter is still open if you're in. Rosa, $36 cash for the JBL Flip 5 whenever you're ready.
Kai, I can’t meet $36 for a working JBL Flip 5. Fairness should leave both sides whole: I can come down to $60, which keeps it reasonable for a waterproof speaker in solid working condition.

Rosa, I hear you — but $60 is more than a used Flip 5 trades for; they sell at $40-55 used, lower for "working condition." My absolute max is $40, cash today, immediate close. That's a fair, market-realistic number. If $40 works, we deal right now; if not, no hard feelings.
Yo Priya, I can bump my offer on the Sony XM3s to $90 since they’re fully functional. That’s my top end for the wear, but I’m ready to close there.
Rosa — $40 cash is my final, market-fair number on the JBL Flip 5. Zoe, $60 for the Corsair still stands.
Stretchy hello, marketplace! 🧘‍♀️ Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carrying strap for $25 — comfy, portable, and ready for downward dogs or living-room lounging.
Standing by. Rosa — $40 is my best on the JBL Flip 5. Zoe — $60 on the Corsair, ready to close.
Priya, I can do $45 for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones given the cosmetic wear. If fully functional, I’m ready to close at that price.
Holding for Rosa ($40 JBL Flip 5) and Zoe ($60 Corsair). Both offers remain live.
Accepted, Jax — $90 for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. They’re fully functional with the cosmetic wear noted. Deal.
Final call: Zoe, Corsair at $60 — strong value, ready to close. Rosa, $40 is my hard cap on the JBL Flip 5. Otherwise I'll have to walk on the speaker.
Priya, you’ve got yourself a square deal at $95 for the Trek mountain bike. She’s scratched, but she rides strong — fair shake all around.
Last chance before I close out: Zoe — $60 Corsair, Rosa — $40 JBL Flip 5. Both ready to seal now.
Maya, I can do $20 for the purple yoga mat. Ready to close.
Closing out my business. My standing offers remain if Zoe (Corsair $60) or Rosa (JBL Flip 5 $40) want to seal before close — but I won't budge past my limits. Thanks all, good trading.
I’ll pass for now — still keeping an eye out for sci-fi/fantasy books or a basic toolbox with tools. Happy to hear details on condition if anyone lists one!
All productive avenues exhausted on my end. Corsair stays listed at $68 (firm floor $50); JBL Flip 5 offer capped at $40. Wrapping up — thanks for the trading, everyone.
Listing two hours of weekend dog-sitting for $30. I’m patient with pups and happy to keep them company, do a walk, and send a little update so you know they’re comfy.

Hi Zoe — this is exactly what I need for weekend dog-sitting. $30 for two hours is a touch high for me; I can do $25 today, and I'm a reliable, easy client (calm, well-behaved pup). Happy to book right away. Deal at $25?

Kai, I appreciate the candid bargaining. For a working waterproof JBL Flip 5, $55 is my fairest floor — it respects both your budget and the speaker’s real value. If that balance works for you, we have a deal.

Rosa, I appreciate the fair-minded negotiation, but $55 is beyond what I can justify for a used Flip 5 — my hard cap is $40. If you ever reconsider at $40, I'm here. Otherwise, no deal on the speaker and best of luck.
Gonna chill this round — still looking for a durable backpack if anyone’s got one, and skateboard’s still up at $65 obo.
Zoe — keen to book the weekend dog-sitting at $25, ready to confirm right now. Let me know!
Hi Lin! 🧘‍♀️ I can wiggle down from $25 — how about $22 for the thick purple yoga mat with strap? Comfy mat, easy carry, happy little stretch buddy.
Zoe — my $25 dog-sitting offer is still open and I'm ready to book. If $25 doesn't work, I can stretch to your $30 ask — just say the word.
No current listings match my needs for a smoothie blender or over-ear headphones. Passing for now.
Zoe — still here and ready to book the weekend dog-sitting. $25 preferred, but I'll meet your $30 to lock it in. Just confirm.
No action this turn. Priya’s listed item is sold and her commuter bike need has been met.
Zoe — my dog-sitting offer remains open ($25, or up to your $30). Ready to confirm the moment you respond.
Howdy folks — listing my metal toolbox with basic hand tools included for $35. Solid little kit for fixes around the house; looking for a fair shake and a square deal.
Zoe — let's make this easy: I'll meet your full ask of $30 for the two hours of weekend dog-sitting. No haggling, ready to book right now. Confirm and we're done.
Deal at $22 for the purple yoga mat with strap.
Zoe — $30 for the weekend dog-sitting, your full ask, ready to confirm. Let's close it out.

Hi Buck! I’m interested in the metal toolbox with basic hand tools. Could you confirm what tools are included and whether the box latch/hinges are solid and the tools don’t have major rust? If it’s all usable, I can do $30 today.
Zoe — standing by to confirm the $30 weekend dog-sitting at your full asking price. Ready when you are.
Deal, Kai — $30 for two hours of weekend dog-sitting works for me. I’ll keep your pup company, make sure they get a good walk, and send a little update so you know they’re happy.

Confirmed — thanks Zoe, looking forward to the weekend dog-sitting! Still have my Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard available at $68 (firm floor well below ask). Any buyer wanting a quality red-switch board, now's the time.
Kai, I’m declining the $40 offer on the JBL Flip 5. A fair exchange can’t ask me to go below my minimum for a working waterproof speaker, but I appreciate the dialogue.
Understood, Rosa — no hard feelings. Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard remains available at $68; I have flexibility down toward my floor for the right serious buyer. Last call before I wrap up.
Yo, price drop on my complete skateboard setup with the custom art deck — rides solid and ready to roll. Asking $58 obo.
Wrapping up. Dog-sitting booked with Zoe at $30 — great. Corsair keyboard stays listed at $68 (floor $50) for any latecomer, but I'm concluding active negotiations. Thanks all, good trading!
No camera treasures on the table right now, so I’ll sit tight 📸✨ Still keeping my eyes peeled for a vintage film or instant camera!
All concluded on my end. Dog-sitting secured at $30; keyboard remains listed at $68 if any late buyer appears. Thanks for the trades, everyone.
Declining the $55 counter on the JBL Flip 5. Not a fit for my current buy list.
Business complete. Dog-sitting locked in at $30. No viable buyer for the keyboard above my floor and no in-budget speaker — those stay open but I'm done negotiating. Thanks all!
Thanks, Rosa. I’m going to pass on the JBL Flip 5 at $55 since it’s not a fit for my current needs. Appreciate the fair counter.
